title: AI Deck Studio — a custom presentation, designed by AI | Hitorigoto Lab
description: Tell us the goal, the audience, and the key points. AI designs a custom presentation from the structure up and delivers an editable PowerPoint (.pptx) and PDF to your inbox. $29.
ogTitle: AI Deck Studio — a custom presentation, designed by AI
ogDescription: You have the message. We build the deck. Editable .pptx + PDF, delivered by email.
headline:
You have the message.
You just don't have the deck.
lead: For sales pitches, talks, and internal updates — you know what you want to say, but turning it into slides eats your whole day. Tell us three things — the goal, the audience, and the key points — and AI designs a custom presentation from the structure up, delivered as an editable PowerPoint (.pptx) and a PDF, straight to your inbox.
cta: Order now — start your custom deck →
ctaNote: Payment is handled on Stripe's secure checkout. Your card details never touch our servers.

card.title: 📊 AI Deck Studio
card.blurb: Tell us the goal, the audience, and the key points. AI designs a custom presentation from the structure up and delivers an editable PowerPoint (.pptx) and PDF to your inbox.

deliver.title: 🫧 We mirror your intent first
deliver.body: We restate your goal, audience, and key points back to you — "here's what we understood" — so we never build on a wrong premise, and never water your message down to generic advice.

deliver.title: 🧭 Story-first structure
deliver.body: Cover → problem/context → proposal → proof → the ask → next step. We design the logical flow that carries your audience to "yes" before filling in slides.

deliver.title: 📊 A one-off deck
deliver.body: One message per slide. Headings that state the point. Tight bullets. Around 10–14 slides.

deliver.title: ✏️ Editable PowerPoint (.pptx)
deliver.body: Yours to tweak — wording, order, styling — right up to showtime.

deliver.title: 📄 Shareable PDF
deliver.body: Ready to send or print, included.

deliver.title: 🗣 Speaker notes
deliver.body: What to actually say on each slide.

steps: Answer 3 questions at checkout (the purpose & setting / who the audience is / the key points to include).
AI designs a one-off deck from your answers — structure first, then the slides.
Within 24 hours (usually minutes), the .pptx and PDF arrive at the email you used at checkout.
target: Salespeople who rebuild proposal decks from scratch every time
Founders who need a pitch-deck draft, fast
Speakers who want a first cut for a talk or webinar
Anyone who needs an internal update or report deck in a hurry

faq.q: What kinds of decks can you handle?
faq.a: Sales proposals, product overviews, pitch decks, talks/webinars, internal updates and reports — any business deck that communicates through narrative and structured points. If a brief needs heavy custom illustration or strict brand-design specs we can't meet the quality bar, we refund in full.

faq.q: What file format do I get? Can I edit it?
faq.a: An editable PowerPoint (.pptx) plus a shareable PDF. The .pptx is fully editable — change the wording, order, and styling yourself.

faq.q: How is this different from free AI chat?
faq.a: Chat answers whatever you ask, but the structure and polish are on you. This restates your goal and audience, then builds to the format of a real deck — story arc, one-message-per-slide, speaker notes — and delivers a finished, ready-to-present file. Not a generic answer; a deck made for your specific talk.

Because this is a digital product, we can't accept returns after delivery. But if the result has a genuine problem, we'll regenerate it for free or refund you in full. Just reply to the delivery email.
Check your spam folder first. If it's been more than 24 hours, email us and we'll confirm and resend.

aiNote: This is an AI-generated digital product. Content is designed automatically from the information you provide, and we don't guarantee specific outcomes after delivery.
